overall.description: A first-person journey through a futuristic industrial complex in Cyberpunk 2077, starting under a covered concrete structure and driving toward massive nuclear cooling towers. The clip features high-end game engine rendering with ray-traced lighting, showcasing industrial architecture, overhead pipes, and billboards along a deserted asphalt road.

events.description: passing parked truck on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: driving forward through the covered industrial area toward the open road ahead

notable_agents.action: green vintage car parked on the right side
large truck parked near the ramp ahead

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with support columns
vintage green sedan parked on the roadside
concrete ramp with stairs leading up to the highway
network of industrial pipes running beneath the overpass

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete highway overpass in a sheltered industrial loading area. The camera moves forward past a parked green car on the right and approaches a truck near a concrete ramp, with industrial pipes visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial approach with cooling towers visible in distance

events.description: exiting the shadow of the overpass into bright direct sunlight
camera pans upward to look at the massive industrial building structure overhead

agents.ego_description: turning left onto the main industrial road while looking up at the massive building structure

entered.detail: gigantic multi-level industrial building with red and gray panels emitting steam
twin massive hyperboloid cooling towers dominating the horizon
white steam venting from the industrial complex
tall concrete walls lining the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered area into bright sunlight, the camera turns left onto a wide industrial road. The view opens up to reveal a massive industrial complex with twin cooling towers in the distance, while the camera tilts up to admire the gigantic building structure overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with sound barriers and overhead pipes

events.description: entering long straight corridor flanked by high concrete walls
passing under overhead industrial pipe structures

agents.ego_description: driving straight down the long industrial corridor toward the cooling towers

entered.detail: tall textured concrete walls with vertical ridges
large colorful advertisements mounted on the left wall
heavy metal pipes spanning across the road overhead
metal gantry structure supporting traffic signals

segments.scene_description: Driving down a long straight industrial corridor flanked by high concrete walls and commercial billboards on the left. Overhead pipes span the road as the cooling towers grow larger in the distance, transitioning from far to mid-range view.

scene_state.functional_zone: power plant approach with massive cooling towers at intersection

events.description: cooling towers become dominant massive structures filling the view
approaching traffic light at intersection near cooling tower base

agents.ego_description: approaching the base of the massive cooling towers and slowing for the intersection

entered.detail: long red industrial warehouse building with multiple windows
traffic signal showing red light at the intersection
palm trees visible near the cooling tower base

segments.scene_description: The final approach to the massive cooling towers which now dominate the entire view. The camera drives toward a traffic light at the intersection near the tower base, passing a red industrial building on the right and palm trees visible near the power plant entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a sheltered industrial underpass into a vast, sun-drenched complex dominated by towering nuclear architecture. It begins beneath a massive concrete highway overpass, gliding past a parked green car and a truck near a loading ramp under a network of overhead pipes. As the camera exits the covered area into bright sunlight, the view opens up to reveal twin cooling towers in the distance while the perspective tilts upward to take in the scale of the surrounding industrial structures. The scene then shifts into a long, straight corridor flanked by high concrete walls and commercial billboards, with the cooling towers growing steadily larger as the camera advances. Finally, the path leads toward a traffic light at the base of the towers, passing a red industrial building and scattered palm trees as the massive structures come to dominate the entire frame.
